---
title: "Fasting and Stress Eating"
author: "Lisa Menghini"
date: "2026-04"
format: pptx
---

## Stress Manipulation Check

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_stress_check.png)

## Manipulation Checks

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_manip_checks.png)

## Primary Outcome

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_total_main.png)

## Forest Plot

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_forest_main.png)

## Secondary Outcomes

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_secondary_outcomes.png)

## SRS Interaction

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_srs_interaction.png)

## Individual Examples

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_individual_examples.png)

## Individual Examples 2

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_individual_examples_2.png)

## Table 3: Primary Model

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(officer)
library(flextable)

table3 <- data.frame(
  Predictor = c("Intercept", "Metabolic condition (fasted vs. satiated)"),
  b = c("323.16", "39.37"),
  SE = c("29.54", "24.73"),
  CI = c("[263.56, 382.76]", "[−9.09, 87.84]"),
  p = c("< .001", ".122")
)

flextable(table3) |>
  set_header_labels(
    Predictor = "Predictor",
    b = "b",
    SE = "SE",
    CI = "95% CI",
    p = "p"
  ) |>
  bold(part = "header") |>
  italic(j = "b") |>
  italic(j = "SE") |>
  italic(j = "p") |>
  hline_top(part = "header", border = fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "header", border = fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "body", border = fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  autofit()
```

## Table 5: Moderation Analyses

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(officer)
library(flextable)

table5 <- data.frame(
  Moderator = c(
    "Stress reactivity (SRS)",
    "Adaptive ER (CERQ)",
    "Maladaptive ER (CERQ)",
    "Trait anxiety (STADI)",
    "Restrained eating (EDE-Q)",
    "Stress-induced eating (SSES)"
  ),
  b = c("-10.64", "-69.21", "-29.48", "4.37", "-1.27", "29.48"),
  SE = c("75.50", "47.58", "37.37", "34.94", "23.75", "42.63"),
  CI = c("[-164.82, 143.55]", "[-166.38, 27.96]", "[-105.79, 46.83]",
         "[-66.98, 75.73]", "[-49.77, 47.24]", "[-57.58, 116.54]"),
  chi2 = c("0.02", "2.04", "0.62", "0.02", "0.003", "0.47"),
  p = c(".888", ".153", ".432", ".900", ".957", ".491")
)

flextable(table5) |>
  set_header_labels(
    Moderator = "Moderator",
    b = "b",
    SE = "SE",
    CI = "95% CI",
    chi2 = "χ²",
    p = "p"
  ) |>
  bold(part = "header") |>
  italic(j = c("b", "SE", "p")) |>
  hline_top(part = "header", border = fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "header", border = fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "body", border = fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  autofit()
```

##
